underlying_goal: Fix data quality issue where Bundesliga set piece taker data had too many teams (22 instead of 18) due to inconsistent team name mappings, and clean up the database
brief_summary: User wanted to diagnose and fix phantom team names in Bundesliga set piece data (22 teams instead of 18) and clean up the database; Claude traced the root cause to whitespace differences in team name mappings, fixed the mappings, added audit tooling, and cleaned 53 wrong DB entries.
